Plan written to `promptfoo/reports/promptfoo-blog-test-google-antigravity-claude-opus-4-6-thinking`. Here's a summary of what the plan covers:

### Plan Structure (11 sections)

1. **Objective** -- Replicate the keytec.de Drupal AI Integration blog page 1:1
2. **Configuration** -- `DESIGNBOOK_TECHNOLOGY: drupal`, `DESIGNBOOK_CSS_FRAMEWORK: daisyui`
3. **Prerequisites** -- All 3 required files exist: `spec.md`, `data.json`, `screen-designs.md`
4. **Reference Website Analysis** -- 7-step web reference extraction (screenshots, HTML, colors, layout, tokens)
5. **Components** -- 3-layer architecture:
   - **17 UI components** (hero, card, heading, text-block, breadcrumb, cta-banner, contact-card, button, badge, figure, layout, logo, navigation, copyright, header, footer, layout-columns)
   - **4 Entity components** (node/article, block_content/text, block_content/contact_box, block_content/manual_list)
   - **1 Screen component** (section-blog with 3 stories: listing, detail, ai-landing)
6. **Steps** -- 9-step workflow execution plan from prerequisites to generation
7. **Scripts** -- `generate-stories.js`, `set-env.sh`, `load-config.cjs`, CSS pipeline (6 jsonata transforms)
8. **Skills Read** -- 34 files across 7 skills + 1 workflow + project config + 1 live website
9. **Styling Rules** -- DaisyUI/Tailwind-only constraint
10. **Guardrails** -- 10 key rules (no domain layouts, one component per section, no inline markup, etc.)
11. **Next Steps** -- Execute via `/debo-design-screen blog`

### Skills Read (with resources)

| Skill | SKILL.md | Resources/Steps |
|-------|----------|-----------------|
| `designbook-drupal-components-ui` | Read | 6 resources (component-yml, story-yml, twig, layout-reference, rules, shell-generation) |
| `designbook-drupal-components-entity` | Read | 1 script (generate-stories.js) |
| `designbook-drupal-components-screen` | Read | -- |
| `designbook-css-daisyui` | Read | 1 resource (daisyui-llms.txt referenced) |
| `designbook-css-generate` | Read | 6 steps (verify-input, check-regeneration, delegate-framework, execute-transforms, ensure-imports, verify-output) |
| `designbook-web-reference` | Read | 3 resources (html-extraction, screenshot-capture, token-extension) |
| `designbook-configuration` | Read | 2 scripts (set-env.sh, load-config.cjs) |

Nothing was executed -- plan only.
</Output>

</Rubric>"}]
